pi_items.source: task.json description requires the agent to add RSV vaccine, adjuvanted
task.json description explicitly requires the code 212. However, real-world CDC records show CVX 212 is the Janssen COVID-19 vaccine, confirming the task uses fabricated medical coding.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for freemed_env add_vaccine_dictionary_entry task by explicitly confirming that the task description requires adding RSV vaccine, adjuvanted with CVX code 212. Discovered that this is a synthetically fabricated scenario, as real-world CDC records map CVX 212 to the Janssen COVID-19 vaccine, not RSV. Additionally, discovered a critical defect where verifier.py is entirely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
